reviews.title: A masterpiece of puzzle design
reviews.text: Portal 2 builds on everything that made the original great and then some. The writing is razor-sharp, the puzzles are inventive without being obtuse, and the co-op campaign is one of the best cooperative experiences in gaming.

reviews.title: The gold standard for open-world RPGs
reviews.text: The Witcher 3 delivers one of the richest open worlds ever crafted. The side quests alone rival the main storylines of most other RPGs. Hearts of Stone and Blood and Wine are essential.

reviews.title: A slow burn that pays off beautifully
reviews.text: Red Dead Redemption 2 is a masterclass in world-building and storytelling. Arthur Morgan is one of the best protagonists in gaming history. Take your time with this one.

reviews.title: Redemption arc of the decade
reviews.text: Cyberpunk 2077 had a rough launch but has transformed into a genuinely great RPG. Night City is one of the most atmospheric settings in gaming. Phantom Liberty is a must-play.

reviews.title: Timeless competitive FPS
reviews.text: Counter-Strike 2 carries the legacy well. The core gameplay loop is as tight as ever. The transition from CSGO was bumpy but the foundation is rock solid.
